name: ESG Inc.
business: ESG Inc. develops and operates sustainable plant-based ingredients and food production, focusing on mushroom cultivation, composting, food processing, and distribution. It sells fresh white button mushrooms, Phase III compost, and mushroom seasoning powder through its operating subsidiaries in China.
sellsTo: export markets (e.g., East and Southeast Asia)

exposures.sentence: ESG Inc. ( ESGI ) was incorporated in October 2022 as a Nevada holding corporation and is headquartered at Chadds Ford, PA and develops and operates sustainable plant-based ingredients and food production and distribution with the planned expansion into the food related business with the substantial experience of its management team, including experience and relationships in the industry of mushroom, agriculture and food in the world and the capital markets in the States.

tamClaims.claim: The global plant-based food market is expected to reach 77.8 billion U.S. dollars in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: The global plant-based food market is expected to reach 77.8 billion U.S. dollars in 2025.
